utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is clearly identified; travel_dates (2024-10-15 to 2024-10-19) are specific; transportation includes flight details (airline, class, dates, baggage, cancellation, total_cost); accommodation includes hotel name, type, location, amenities, and total_cost; activities specify name, duration, difficulty, and total_cost; additional_services describe a restaurant with cuisine, location, and cost; total_budget includes total_cost, currency, and remaining_budget. All required details are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following items: destination 'Lisbon, Portugal', transportation 'Budget Airline' in Economy Class, accommodation 'Tranquil Inn', activity 'Full-day guided hiking and yoga experience', and restaurant 'Vegan Bistro'. According to the ground-truth ratings: 'Lisbon, Portugal' has a rating of 7, 'Budget Airline Economy Class' falls under 'budget_airlines' with Economy Class rating 10, 'Tranquil Inn' has a rating of 7, the activity combines hiking and yoga — both 'Hiking Expedition' and 'Yoga Retreat' are rated 10, and 'Vegan Bistro' has a rating of 10.
